title: Enrolled Nurse
description:
1. JOB PURPOSE

The jobholder is responsible to provide personalised, and cost-effective care to the patients in the nursing home in accordance to established policies and procedures, standards of nursing care and practices.


2. Duties and Responsibilities

2.1 Primary Responsibilities and Duties (80%)

2.1.1 Complies with approved standards of nursing practices.

.

2.1.2 Assists the RN to supervise care staff and healthcare attendants.

2.1.3 Provides basic nursing care to the patients.

2.1.4 Updates on changes in patient’s conditions and needs.

2.1.5 Ensures care delivery and nursing interventions as outlined in the care plan.

2.1.6 Carries out nursing rounds with the RN.

2.1.7 Supervises care staff to ensure comfort and good personal hygiene of patients under his/her care.

2.1.8 Supervises care staff to check, monitor and record patient’s vital signs.

2.1.9 Maintains accurate documentation of care given.

2.1.10 Assists RN in serving medications to patients and comply with safe medication practices.

2.1.11 Assists and guides care staff in the transfer and positioning of non-ambulant patients.

2.1.12 Supervises care staff in diet serving and feeding of patients that require help.

2.1.13 Supervises care staff in ensuring comfort and good personal hygiene of patients under his/her care.

2.1.14 Assists in the admission and orientation of new patients.

2.1.15 Performs rehabilitation activities such as motion exercise and walking with patients.

2.1.16 Organizes and sends patient for appropriate therapy as prescribed, example occupational therapy.

2.1.17 Co-ordinates visits for medical check-ups and transport arrangement.

2.1.2 Accompanies patient to the hospital/polyclinic for follow-up appointments.

2.1.3 Initiates actions in emergency situations; escalate and provides supports to RN promptly.

2.1.4 Works with RN to ensure a safe and clean environment in the home.

postedCompany.description:
THYE HUA KWAN NURSING HOME LIMITED

HEALTHCARE/ LIFE SCIENCES/ BIOMEDICAL/ PHARMACEUTICAL/ MEDICAL SERVICES

Thye Hua Kwan Nursing Home @ Hougang will serve 285 residents, including 114 residents with dementia.  We believe in providing the best quality of life for aging Singaporeans and will strive to facilitate aging in the community. To do that, the Nursing Home will consider all psychosocial, physical, medical and emotional aspects of our clients and create a tranquil, person-centred and safe environment for them.

With our mission "To serve Mankind", Thye Hua Kwan endeavors to help anyone who needs help with full respect to their race, creed, language, culture and religion, to assist them in every way possible.
